auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to manage your merchant account.
auth.forgot_password_hint: Contact the MITHQAL admin who created your account to issue a new password.
auth.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.generic_error: We could not sign you in. Please try again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.hero_title: Everything your merchant needs, in one portal.
auth.hero_subtitle: Configure branches, manage your POS staff, build your menu, and watch your sales — all from a workspace built for Oman.

dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.subtitle: This is your merchant control panel. As MITHQAL provisions more capabilities, they will appear here.
